caption:
They say professors are serious, but they don't tell you the secrets of the late-night office hour... 🔥

The fluorescent lights hummed overhead, casting a soft glow on the leather chair behind my desk. I adjusted the silk blouse I wore today, making sure the fabric hugged every curve in my figure just right. It was 10 PM, and Professor Elena was the only one awake. A new student slipped in, nervous, eyes wide, asking for help with... everything. We laughed, we whispered, and the air got thick with something more than just academic exchange. My skirt felt tight, my heartbeat louder than the clock. Who knows what else this semester might bring. 😈

#ProfessorElena #UniversitySecrets #CurvesAndBooks #LateNightStudy #AlluringTeacher
